metadata.seed: Dont know what to do Im just at a point of my life that i dont know what to do tried to get into 2 seperate relationships one ended up teling me she was lesbian and more recently one girl i was trying to get just friended me for no reason. I fell out of place at home my friends what me to talk but i cant when i trie to tell then i just break into tears. I just fell like im falling into an endles abiss

patient.query: Dont know what to do Im just at a point of my life that i dont know what to do tried to get into 2 seperate relationships one ended up teling me she was lesbian and more recently one girl i was trying to get just friended me for no reason. I fell out of place at home my friends what me to talk but i cant when i trie to tell then i just break into tears. I just fell like im falling into an endles abiss

triggers: feeling out of place at home
automatic_thoughts: I don't know what to do
I'm falling into an endless abyss
I can't talk to my friends

llm_response.response: I'm really sorry to hear that you're feeling this way. It sounds like you've been through some tough experiences recently, and it's understandable that you might feel lost or overwhelmed. Let's take things one step at a time. Can we start by exploring what's been going on for you and see if we can make sense of it together?

validate_and_reflect.response: I'm really sorry to hear that you're feeling this way. It sounds like you've been through some tough experiences recently, and it's understandable that you might feel lost or overwhelmed. Let's take things one step at a time. Can we start by exploring what's been going on for you and see if we can make sense of it together?

socratic_questioning.response: I'm really sorry to hear that you're feeling this way. Let's try to understand what's been going on for you. Can you tell me more about how you've been feeling since the recent events with your relationships? And have you noticed any patterns in your emotions or thoughts that might be contributing to your distress?

alternative_perspective.response: I'm really sorry to hear that you're feeling this way. It can be incredibly difficult when things don't go as planned, especially in relationships. Have you ever considered what a trusted friend or family member might say about your situation? Sometimes, hearing another perspective can help us see things more clearly.

safety_check.response: I'm really sorry that you're feeling this way. It sounds like you've been through a lot recently, and it can be hard to know what to do when things don't go as planned. Let's take it one step at a time. When you said you feel like you're falling into an endless abyss, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
